alt: Aerial sunset view of the Miraflores skyline of apartment towers standing along the top of the Costa Verde cliffs in Lima, with the coastal highway at the cliff base and Pacific surf rolling onto the beach in the foreground
description: Golden-hour aerial of the Miraflores skyline above the Costa Verde cliffs in Lima, Peru — apartment towers along the clifftop, dramatic eroded cliffs in pink-orange sunset light, the coastal highway at the cliff base, and Pacific surf rolling onto the Costa Verde beaches in the foreground.
title: Scenic View of the Coastline of Lima, Peru
